news.headline: AMH reports 15% increase in quarterly distribution for Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results.
news.summary: In its latest announcement on February 20, 2025, without specifying the source, AMH (NYSE: AMH) reported a significant 15% rise in its quarterly distribution. The company, a prominent player in the single-family rental homes sector, shared its financial and operational performance for the quarter and full year. The increase in the distribution percentage indicates positive growth and potential success for the company in the upcoming periods.

news.headline: Evolent Health reports $646.5 million revenue in Q4 2024 and $2,554.7 million for full year, with a net loss of $30.6 million.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Evolent Health, Inc. reported a revenue of $646.5 million, marking a 16.3% increase from the same period in 2023. For the full year of 2024, the company's revenue stood at $2,554.7 million, reflecting a growth of 30.1% compared to 2023. However, during the same three-month period, Evolent Health, Inc. incurred a net loss of $30.6 million attributable to common shareholders.

news.headline: Coca-Cola Consolidated posts Q4 earnings for FY2024.
Brett Parker retires from Lucky Strike Entertainment after 24 years, previously serving as EVP & CFO.
news.summary: Lucky Strike Entertainment, a prominent operator of location-based entertainment, has disclosed the retirement of Brett Parker from the company. Brett, who held the positions of Executive Vice Chairman and Chief Financial Officer, played a crucial role in the company's growth. Lucky Strike, listed on NYSE under the ticker LUCK, acknowledged Brett's leadership in shaping the company into a global leader in this sector. Thomas expressed gratitude for Brett's contributions towards Lucky Strike's success.

news.headline: Verastem Oncology to present multiple data at Society of Gynecologic Oncology 2025 meeting on women's cancer, including Phase 2 trial info for avutometinib plus defactinib in LGSOC.
news.summary: Verastem Oncology, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as VSTM, revealed various oral and poster presentations in Boston. The Phase 2 RAMP 201 (ENGOT-ov60/GOG-3052) trial data will be presented, focusing on the avutometinib plus defactinib combination for patients with recurrent low-grade serous ovarian cancer (LGSOC). These findings aim to advance treatments for RAS/MAPK pathway-driven cancers. The company's announcements at the event include crucial analyses and updates.

news.headline: Logility reported Q3 fiscal 2025 results. Aptean to acquire Logility in definitive agreement.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Logility Supply Chain Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq: LGTY) disclosed its third quarter fiscal year 2025 financial outcomes, showcasing its prominent position in AI-driven supply chain planning software. The company recently unveiled a significant development with Aptean, Inc., a worldwide supplier of essential enterprise software solutions. In a strategic move, Aptean agreed to acquire Logility according to the definitive agreement inked on January 24, 2025. This merger points towards a pivotal shift in the industry landscape, anticipating substantial growth and market influence.

news.headline: Traeger Inc. (NYSE: COOK) to release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on March 6, 2025, via conference call.
news.summary: Traeger, Inc. disclosed they will unveil their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 6, 2025, following the market closure. Known for their wood pellet grill, Traeger (NYSE: COOK) is scheduled to host a conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes. Interested individuals can join the call by dialing (833) 470-1428, or +1 (404) 975-4839 for international participants.

news.headline: Savers Value Village, Inc. (NYSE: SVV) reported Q4 financial results: Net sales up 5% to $402M, U.S. sales up 10.5% and Canada down 2.7%.
news.summary: Savers Value Village, Inc. reported its financial results for the thirteen weeks ending December 28, 2024, showing a 5.0% increase in net sales to $402.0 million compared to the same period in 2023. Sales in the United States saw a significant rise of 10.5%, while Canada experienced a slight decline of 2.7%. In constant currency terms, net sales rose by 6.0% to $405.9 million, with the U.S. performing particularly well. The company, listed on the NYSE as SVV, remains optimistic about its performance in both countries despite the mixed results.

news.headline: Floor & Decor Holdings, Inc. releases Q4 and Fiscal 2024 financial results, ending Dec 26, 2024, CEO commends teams' efforts. #NYSE #FND
news.summary: In Atlanta, Floor & Decor Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: FND) reported its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2024 concluding on December 26, 2024. CEO Tom Taylor commended the company's efforts in achieving strong results during this period, emphasizing the dedication of both store and support teams in driving sales, enhancing customer service, and effectively controlling costs. The company expressed great satisfaction with their accomplishments over the quarter and full year.

news.headline: American Woodmark to be at Wolfe Research Housing Conference in NYC on March 4, 2025. Executives to participate - Paul Joachimczyk and Kevin Dunnigan. Celebrates creativity.

Representing the company will be Paul Joachimczyk, Senior Vice President, and Chief Financial Officer, along with Kevin Dunnigan, Vice President, and Treasurer. American Woodmark, boasting a team of over 8,600 employees and multiple brands, embraces creativity and innovation.

news.headline: Newmont's 2024 results and 2025 guidance revealed in Denver, marking progress and plans for upcoming year.
news.summary: In Denver, Newmont has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company also offered guidance for the full year of 2025. Key numbers include revenue, profit, production figures, and any other significant metrics discussed in the report.

news.headline: MP Materials Corp reported fourth quarter and full year 2024 results, achieved record 11,478 metric tons of rare earth oxides production and 7,803 tons sales.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, MP Materials Corp. (NYSE: MP) shared its latest financial data for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. Key highlights for the fourth quarter of 2024 included the initiation of commercial production of NdPr metal at Independence, the commencement of trial production of automotive-grade magnets, and the generation of 11,478 metric tons of rare earth oxides ("REO") in concentrate. This production figure set a new quarterly record despite a planned maintenance shutdown. Additionally, the company managed to sell 7,803 metric tons of the produced REO during this period.

news.headline: Newmont reports 2024 mineral reserves of 134.1M gold ounces and 13.5M tonnes of copper in Denver.
news.summary: Denver-based Newmont has recently announced its mineral reserves for 2024, revealing a total of 134.1 million ounces of gold and 13.5 million tonnes of copper. This data underscores the company's significant holdings in both precious metals, further solidifying its position in the mining industry.

news.headline: Texas Roadhouse reports strong Q4 2024 results: Total revenue $1.44B, net income $115.83M, EPS $1.73. FY comparable sales up, diluted EPS increased 42.5%. Plans 2025 commodity cost inflation of 3-4%, $400M capex. Board approved $0.68 quarterly dividend and $500M stock repurchase program. Conference call today at 5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. reported financial results for Q4 and FY ending December 31, 2024. Total revenue for Q4 was $1.44 billion (23.5% increase from 2023) and $5.37 billion for FY (16% increase). Net income for Q4 was $115.83 million (59.9% increase) and $433.59 million for FY (42.2% increase). Diluted EPS was $1.73 for Q4 (60.1% increase) and $6.47 for FY (42.5% increase). Comparable restaurant sales increased by 7.7% at company restaurants and 6.3% at domestic franchise restaurants in Q4. The company also opened 9 company restaurants and 5 franchise restaurants in Q4, and 31 company restaurants and 14 franchise restaurants for the FY. The company announced a stock repurchase program of up to $500 million and a quarterly cash dividend of $0.68 per share. The 2025 outlook includes commodity cost inflation of 3-4%, positive comparable sales growth, store week growth of 5%, and total capital expenditures of around $400 million. The CEO mentioned plans for continued growth and appreciated the support of customers and shareholders.

news.headline: iRhythm Technologies reported Q4 revenue of $164.3M, a 24% increase YoY, with a net loss of $1.3M. Full-year revenue was $591.8M, up 20.1% YoY, with a net loss of $113.3M. Cash, equivalents, and securities were $535.6M. Revenue guidance for 2025 is $675M to $685M, with an adjusted EBITDA margin of 7.0% to 8.0%.
news.summary: iRhythm Technologies, Inc. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. In Q4, revenue was $164.3 million, a 24% increase from Q4 2023, with a gross margin of 70.0%. Net loss was $1.3 million, a $37.4 million improvement from Q4 2023, and adjusted EBITDA was $19.3 million. For the full year 2024, revenue was $591.8 million, a 20.1% increase from 2023. Gross margin was 68.9%, and net loss was $113.3 million. Cash, cash equivalents, and securities were $535.6 million as of December 31, 2024. The company projects revenue for full year 2025 between $675 million to $685 million. The CEO highlighted operational achievements, enhanced quality systems, and product launches. Operating expenses for Q4 2024 were $119.2 million, down from $126.6 million in Q4 2023. Net loss for Q4 was $1.3 million, compared to $38.7 million in Q4 2023. Adjusted EBITDA excludes certain non-cash charges. The company is focused on market presence, international growth, innovation, and operational efficiencies. Total assets were $931.4 million, with liabilities at $840.5 million and stockholders' equity at $90.9 million as of December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Alarm.com releases Q4 and full year 2024 financial results.
news.summary: A new study has found that the average temperature in the Arctic region has increased by 3.1 degrees Fahrenheit over the past century. This rise is more than double the global average temperature increase. Researchers analyzed data from 25 Arctic monitoring stations and satellite observations to reach this conclusion. The study also revealed that the rate of warming in the Arctic is accelerating, with temperatures increasing at twice the global rate since the mid-1990s. This rapid warming poses a significant threat to the region's ecosystem and indigenous communities, as well as contributing to global sea-level rise. Scientists emphasize the urgent need for action to mitigate the impacts of climate change in the Arctic.

news.headline: CTO Realty Growth reported $330.8M investments, raised $165.2M through ATM program in 2024, with a signed pipeline of $5.2M. FFO at $1.88 per share, AFFO at $2.00 per share in 2024, with $57.4M investments in Q4. Leased occupancy at 93.4% with a net loss/share of $(0.56) in Q4 2024. Dividend declared at $0.38/share for Q1 2025.
news.summary: CTO Realty Growth, Inc. reported closing investments of $330.8 million in 2024 at an initial cash yield of 9.3%, with $165.2 million raised through a common stock ATM program. They signed a pipeline of $5.2 million for future leasing. Highlights for fourth quarter 2024 include a net loss per share of $(0.56), Core FFO of $0.46 per share, and AFFO of $0.49 per share. For the full year, net loss per share was $(0.35), Core FFO was $1.88 per share, and AFFO was $2.00 per share. Investments for the year totaled $330.8 million with two properties sold for $38.0 million. The company also raised capital ending 2024 with $222 million in liquidity. Leases signed in Q4 2024 totaled 67,788 square feet, with a 7.8% growth in cash base rent for comparable leases. Yearly leasing activity totaled 452,301 square feet with a 23% growth in cash base rent for comparable leases. The company's portfolio comprised 23 properties with a total of 4,687 square feet, with a leased occupancy of 93.4% and an overall occupancy of 90.3%. The net debt to Pro Forma Adjusted EBITDA was 6.3 times with a fixed charge coverage ratio of 2.8 times, and net debt to total enterprise value was 40.8% by the end of 2024. Dividends of $0.38 per share were declared for the first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: RingCentral reports strong Q4 and FY 2024 results. CEO Vlad Shmunis mentions a good quarter. Introduced new product RingCentral AI Receptionist (AIR).
news.summary: Belmont, California - RingCentral, Inc. revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The global company, recognized for AI-driven business communication solutions, reported positive results with CEO Vlad Shmunis stating, “We had a successful fourth quarter marking a robust year.” RingCentral introduced innovative AI products like RingCentral AI Receptionist (AIR) anticipated to offer substantial benefits. RingCentral, listed on NYSE as RNG, continues to expand its offerings to serve businesses of all magnitudes.

news.headline: Altair reported Q4 2024 revenues of $192.6 million, up 12.3%, with net income of $1.0 million, down from $19.7 million in Q4 2023. Full-year 2024 revenues were $665.8 million, up 8.7%, with net income of $14.2 million compared to a net loss of $(8.9) million in 2023. Altair's pending merger with Siemens will likely close in H1 2025.
news.summary: Altair, a computational intelligence firm, reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. In Q4, software revenue was $179.4M (up 15% yoy), total revenue was $192.6M (up 12.3% yoy), net income was $1.0M (decreased by $18.7M yoy), non-GAAP net income was $47.4M (up $6.3M yoy), and adjusted EBITDA was $61.0M (up 13.9% yoy). For the full year 2024, software revenue was $611.9M (up 11.3% yoy), total revenue was $665.8M (up 8.7% yoy), net income was $14.2M (improved by $23.1M yoy), non-GAAP net income was $119.6M (up $20.8M yoy), and adjusted EBITDA was $149.9M (up 16.1% yoy). Altair's pending acquisition by Siemens is expected to close in the first half of 2025. Non-GAAP financial measures used are Non-GAAP Net Income, Adjusted EBITDA, Free Cash Flow, among others. Altair recommended comparing these non-GAAP measures with GAAP measures for a comprehensive evaluation. Detailed financial statements and important metrics are provided in the article.

news.headline: Rivian reports $170 million gross profit in Q4 2024, aiming for modest gross profit in 2025 with record revenues.

news.headline: Resideo had strong financial performance in 2024 with $6.76 billion in net revenue and $444 million in cash from operating activities.

Additionally, cash generated from operating activities throughout the year amounted to $444 million, marking a new record and surpassing expectations.

news.headline: RingCentral introduces AI Receptionist (AIR) to answer customer questions and transfer calls, like a human receptionist.
news.summary: In Belmont, California, RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG) announced the launch of RingCentral AI Receptionist™ (AIR), a new AI phone agent that utilizes generative AI technology to respond to customer inquiries and redirect calls to appropriate departments. This service is designed to mimic the functions of a traditional receptionist, providing efficient customer service solutions. RingCentral AIR™ distinguishes itself from contact center intelligent virtual agents by being more accessible and integrated directly into RingCentral's platform. This innovation aims to streamline communication processes and enhance customer experience.

news.headline: NeuroPace repurchased 5.3 million shares from KCK Ltd., funded by recent underwritten offering, strengthening its balance sheet. Terminated ATM offering program.
news.summary: NeuroPace, Inc., a medical device company headquartered in Mountain View, California, has successfully completed the repurchase of 5,270,845 shares of its common stock from KCK Ltd. The shares were bought as part of a strategic move to facilitate the organized divestment of all remaining shares owned by KCK Ltd. This repurchase was financed through funds from a recent underwritten public offering. Following the completion of this transaction, NeuroPace has bolstered its balance sheet and is now in a position to support its operations until it reaches cash flow breakeven. Furthermore, the company has decided to cease its current at-the-market offering program. The ticker symbol for NeuroPace, Inc. on Nasdaq is NPCE.
